selection.rule: first 50 never-judged rows where helm_candidate.candidate_status == pending_judge, excluding symbols already present in non-rerun standard_judge_batch_*.json outputs

summary.notes: No verdict is final approval; passing rows remain pending final approval QA.
summary.review_basis: standard_source_table enriched row, standard_semantic_shape_judge_queue semantic brief, S-101 refs where present, Aqua Map refs where present, OpenCPN day render where available, Helm candidate SVG/day render
top_repair_themes: missing third bands in cardinal/isolated-danger multi-band buoy rows
wrong vertical-vs-horizontal stripe orientation for red/white safe-water/special rows
invented blue/grey fills in red/black or black-only buoy rows
generic diamond placeholders used for landmark/building/service symbols
missing local reference renders for a few otherwise plausible spar rows

verdicts.expected: spherical buoy,general ,full-chart. Required spherical buoy body. colours red, black.
verdicts.judge_comments: Fail for first-pass visual parity: correct symbol class/shape/colour order is not yet proven. Not final-approved.
verdicts.observed: Helm renders the spherical buoy with an invented blue/grey lower field instead of a clean red/black semantic pair.
verdicts.required_change: Remove the invented blue/grey fill and redraw as a spherical buoy carrying only the required red/black load-bearing colours.

verdicts.expected: spherical buoy,white,full-chart. Required spherical buoy body. colours white.
verdicts.judge_comments: Pass for first-pass semantic visual parity against the enriched brief and available provider references. Not final-approved.
verdicts.observed: Helm preserves the required symbol family, silhouette, and load-bearing colour/order for this row; remaining differences are scale/stroke/style polish rather than semantic changes.
verdicts.required_change: No semantic repair required before final approval QA; keep pending final approval.
